items.name_cn:
Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
Inheriting the brand's unique craftsmanship and exquisite techniques: detachable shoulder strap, embedded wooden details, leather corners, large zipper, yellow lining, and its unique shell shape. More modern and refined, showcasing a woman's softness and lightness. Can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand 👇🏻👇🏻
11 colors available: Black, Brown, Red, Burgundy, Yellow, Green, Grey, White, Sky Blue, and Navy Blue. 🌈
Size: 23cm (L) x 18.5cm (H) x 10cm (W)
020205

items.name_en: Goyard Yatou, the VILLETTE tote bag offers a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided, with the Hulot pattern side offering a relaxed casual style, and the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) being understated and elegant.

items.name_cn:
Grade A
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CELINE New Arrival. TRIOMPHE CANVAS logo print
Flip top with decorative TRIOMPHE lock, snap closure, one main compartment, one flat pocket, detachable chain strap, and adjustable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying styles. Daily essentials like phone, lipstick, and keys fit easily. Three-in-one design, definitely a popular choice 🫶🏻 Perfect for all occasions!
Style No.: 10L972 Material/Beige Brown
Size: 20.5x11x4 (with original packaging)

items.name_en: Grade A. 25c Ball Grain Leather Hipster Bag
items.name_cn:
Grade A. 25c Ball Grain Leather Hipster Bag
Chanel hobo shoulder bag, boho shoulder bag, medium size
Vintage gold coin button drawstring bucket bag + quilted + vintage black and gold
Classic chain design, full of sophistication! A daily essential, exquisite appearance, fine texture, easily handles both casual and formal occasions
Model AS5311
Dimensions 40-30-15
